_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: Western blots of anti‐dNf1 immunoprecipitates from lysates prepared from adult heads from CRISPR mutants showed no expression of Nf1 in dNF1C1 homozygous animals
details: Successfully showed no expression of neurofibromin in dNf1 C1 homozygous mutant flies using western blots of immunoprecipitates from adult head lysates
